reasoning: The control SC-7 (7) focuses on boundary protection and preventing unauthorized public access, which can be mapped to Kubernetes network security practices. NetworkPolicies can be used to restrict ingress traffic, ensuring no public access unless explicitly allowed. Services should avoid using NodePort to prevent exposing services directly to the internet. Ingress resources should have TLS enabled to secure traffic. Additionally, pods should not use the host network to prevent bypassing network policies.
title: Boundary Protection | Split Tunneling for Remote Devices
